strategy: Tiered hypothesis tests with Bayesian (TPE) search — not brute-force grids.

0.name: mechanism
0.purpose: Isolate collapse/surgery/VICReg mechanics on synthetic linear encoders

1.name: tenant_recipe
1.purpose: Per-org recipe ablation on Phase A corpora (pairwise eval proxy)

2.name: real_text
2.purpose: AG News or MTEB slice — only promote winners from tier 1

vicreg_collapse.hypothesis: VICReg coefficients restore served rank in invariance-only collapse without kNN loss

surgery_futility.hypothesis: Three-tier weight surgery does not improve rank under InfoNCE (futility test)

tenant_recipe.hypothesis: Domain InfoNCE (+ optional VICReg) maximizes tenant nDCG vs zero-shot commercial

barlow_realtext.hypothesis: Barlow domain fine-tune beats InfoNCE on research-rag arXiv holdout by ΔnDCG ≥ 0.005

mrl_edge_deploy.hypothesis: MRL-trained checkpoint improves knn_t8 vs post-hoc truncate on same queries

rag_corpus_scale.hypothesis: 200-paper arXiv harvest improves exam recall without OOD forgetting > 2%

tier_drop_benchmark.hypothesis: Document median rank delta full vs edge-d8-int8 on 20 fixed arXiv queries

hard_negative_mining.hypothesis: Corpus-mined hard negatives beat in-batch negatives for pairwise nDCG on arXiv
